arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Could Ryan Gravenberch leave Anfield in 2025?
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Ryan Gravenberch reportedly takes a stance regarding his future at Anfield ahead of 2025.

arts.ttl: Liverpool defender hints at early injury return before Southampton Carabao Cup tie
arts.sum: Kostas Tsimikas has been out of action since November for Liverpool, but the left-back could be on the mend in time for tonight's tie with Southampton (8pm).

arts.ttl: 'A great honour' - Southampton manager makes Liverpool admission as injury update shared
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (PA Sport Staff, Matt C Jones)
arts.sum: Simon Rusk has taken over at Southampton on a temporary basis following the sacking of Russell Martin on Sunday and will be in charge for the Carabao Cup quarter-final

arts.ttl: Southampton manager target urged to snub Saints and wait for West Ham to sack Lopetegui instead
Virgil Van Dijk, William Saliba among most played in 2024
arts.sum: The CIES Football Observatory has published data on the most used players over the course of the calendar year, with Barcelona's Jules Koundé atop the list and Liverpool's Virgil van Dijk and Real Madrid midfielder Federico Valverde among the top five. Player usage and rest has become a topic of considerable concern in recent weeks and months, particularly after Manchester City's Ballon d'Or-winning midfielder Rodri said players could go on strike if the football calendar continues to become more congested.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds 'tracking the progress' of Premier League right-back as possible Trent Alexander-Arnold replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly tracking the progress of Chelsea's Malo Gusto, shortlisting him as a potential replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold.

arts.ttl: Pep Lijnders sees public Liverpool comments backfire as Anfield duo left in the cold
arts.sum: Pep Lijnders spent six years as Jurgen Klopp's trusted lieutenant at Liverpool, but was sacked by Red Bull Salzburg earlier this week after a disastrous spell in charge of the Austrian side

arts.ttl: Liverpool reservation over Frimpong signing revealed
arts.sum: Liverpool are admirers of Bayer Leverkusen full-back Jeremie Frimpong but have reservations over a potential transfer. Frimpong has been placed on a shortlist of potential targets should Trent Alexander-Arnold depart at the end of the season. Alexander-Arnold’s current contract expires in the summer and Real Madrid have been heavily linked with a move to […] The post Liverpool reservation over Frimpong signing revealed first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'Very impressed': Simon Jordan names the manager Southampton should hire, more likely than Graham Potter
Liverpool could be handed Caoimhin Kelleher transfer decision amid fresh claim and advice
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool transfer news and gossip includes an update on Caoimhin Kelleher
